Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.asset

Class FlixelDefaultAssetManager

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.asset.FlixelDefaultAssetManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Disposable, FlixelAssetManager, FlixelDestroyable
public class FlixelDefaultAssetManager extends Object implements FlixelAssetManager
Default concrete asset manager for FlixelGDX.

This class centralizes asset loading and lifecycle policy in one place. It wraps a single libGDX AssetManager, plus pooled wrappers (via FlixelWrapperFactory) and FlixelTypedAsset that track persist and reference counts and can be cleared on state switches.

Recommended usage: Access this via Flixel.assets.

Path loading: load(String) infers a FlixelSource from the file extension using registerExtension(String, Function). Prefer load(FlixelSource) when the asset type must be explicit.

Experts: getManager() exposes the underlying AssetManager for custom loaders, AssetDescriptor batches, or APIs not wrapped here.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    FlixelDefaultAssetManager()
    Constructs a new asset manager with the default loaders for audio, strings, and sound sources.

  • Constructor Details

    • FlixelDefaultAssetManager

      public FlixelDefaultAssetManager()
      Constructs a new asset manager with the default loaders for audio, strings, and sound sources.

  • Method Details

    • load

      public void load(@NotNull @NotNull String path)
      Description copied from interface: FlixelAssetManager
      Loads an asset using a path and the file extension to choose a FlixelSource factory from the registry on this manager.

      This is the simplest call for beginners, but it is not always the safest: extension alone may not match how you intend to load the file. For deterministic behavior, prefer FlixelAssetManager.load(FlixelSource).

      Specified by:
      load in interface FlixelAssetManager
      Parameters:
      path - Asset path (e.g. internal path like "images/fungus.png").

    • registerExtension

      public void registerExtension(@NotNull @NotNull String extension, @NotNull @NotNull Function<String,FlixelSource<?>> factory)
      Description copied from interface: FlixelAssetManager
      Registers or replaces the factory used for a file extension (e.g. ".png" or png). The factory receives the full path string and returns a FlixelSource whose runtime type is what libGDX AssetManager should load (e.g. Texture).
      Specified by:
      registerExtension in interface FlixelAssetManager
      Parameters:
      extension - File extension, with or without a leading dot; normalized case-insensitively.
      factory - Produces a source for the given path; must not return null.

    • unregisterExtension

      public void unregisterExtension(@NotNull @NotNull String extension)
      Description copied from interface: FlixelAssetManager
      Removes a previously registered extension mapping from this manager instance.
      Specified by:
      unregisterExtension in interface FlixelAssetManager
      Parameters:
      extension - Same form as FlixelAssetManager.registerExtension(String, Function).

    • ensureMiniAudioLoader

      public void ensureMiniAudioLoader()
      Registers (or re-registers) the MiniAudio MASound loader, if the global audio system is available.

      This is a no-op until Flixel.sound is initialized.

    • getManager

      @NotNull public @NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.assets.AssetManager getManager()
      Returns the underlying libGDX AssetManager.
      Specified by:
      getManager in interface FlixelAssetManager
      Returns:
      The underlying libGDX AssetManager for advanced use (loaders, descriptors, raw APIs).

    • load

      public <T> void load(@NotNull @NotNull String fileName, @NotNull @NotNull Class<T> type)
      Description copied from interface: FlixelAssetManager
      Loads by explicit file name and runtime asset type. Prefer FlixelAssetManager.load(FlixelSource) or FlixelAssetManager.load(String) unless you need direct control over the libGDX type.
      Specified by:
      load in interface FlixelAssetManager
      Parameters:
      fileName - Asset key/path passed to libGDX.
      type - Concrete type registered with AssetManager (e.g. Texture.class).

    • load

      public void load(@NotNull @NotNull FlixelSource<?> source)
      Description copied from interface: FlixelAssetManager
      Enqueues loading for the given source’s key and runtime type.
      Specified by:
      load in interface FlixelAssetManager
      Parameters:
      source - Non-null source describing what to load.

    • load

      public void load(@NotNull @NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.assets.AssetDescriptor<?> assetDescriptor)

      load in interface FlixelAssetManager
      Parameters:
      assetDescriptor - Descriptor for the asset to load.

    • update

      public boolean update()
      Description copied from interface: FlixelAssetManager
      Processes one loading task on the underlying AssetManager.
      Specified by:
      update in interface FlixelAssetManager
      Returns:
      true when all queued loading is finished.

    • update

      public boolean update(int millis)
      Description copied from interface: FlixelAssetManager
      Processes loading for up to millis milliseconds (may yield between steps).
      Specified by:
      update in interface FlixelAssetManager
      Parameters:
      millis - Maximum time to spend updating.
      Returns:
      true when all queued loading is finished.

    • unload

      public void unload(@NotNull @NotNull String fileName)
      Description copied from interface: FlixelAssetManager

    • allocateSyntheticWrapperKey

      @NotNull public @NotNull String allocateSyntheticWrapperKey()
      Description copied from interface: FlixelAssetManager
      Allocates a unique key for a caller-constructed wrapper (e.g. FlixelGraphic around an owned texture). Use with FlixelAssetManager.registerWrapper(FlixelPooledWrapper).
      Specified by:
      allocateSyntheticWrapperKey in interface FlixelAssetManager

    • registerWrapper

      public void registerWrapper(@NotNull @NotNull FlixelPooledWrapper wrapper)
      Description copied from interface: FlixelAssetManager
      Registers a caller-built wrapper with the pool for FlixelAssetManager.clearNonPersist() and keyed lookup. The wrapper’s FlixelPooledWrapper.wrapperRegistrationClass() must match a factory registered via FlixelAssetManager.registerWrapperFactory(FlixelWrapperFactory).
      Specified by:
      registerWrapper in interface FlixelAssetManager

    • registerWrapperFactory

      public void registerWrapperFactory(@NotNull @NotNull FlixelWrapperFactory<?> factory)
      Description copied from interface: FlixelAssetManager
      Registers a FlixelWrapperFactory for a wrapper type (e.g. built-in FlixelGraphicWrapperFactory for FlixelGraphic). Custom pooled facades use this; loading plain libGDX types uses FlixelSource + FlixelAssetManager.registerExtension(java.lang.String, java.util.function.Function<java.lang.String, me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.asset.FlixelSource<?>>) instead.
      Specified by:
      registerWrapperFactory in interface FlixelAssetManager

    • obtainWrapper

      @NotNull public <W> W obtainWrapper(@NotNull @NotNull String key, @NotNull @NotNull Class<W> wrapperType)
      Description copied from interface: FlixelAssetManager
      Returns or creates a pooled wrapper of the given type for key.
      Specified by:
      obtainWrapper in interface FlixelAssetManager
      Type Parameters:
      W - Wrapper type.
      Parameters:
      key - Cache key (e.g. asset path for a FlixelGraphic).
      wrapperType - Wrapper class registered by the implementation (e.g. FlixelGraphic.class).
      Returns:
      Pooled wrapper instance.

    • peekWrapper

      @Nullable public <W> W peekWrapper(@NotNull @NotNull String key, @NotNull @NotNull Class<W> wrapperType)
      Description copied from interface: FlixelAssetManager
      Returns a pooled wrapper if present, or null.
      Specified by:
      peekWrapper in interface FlixelAssetManager
      Type Parameters:

      Parameters:

      wrapperType - Wrapper class.
      Returns:
      Cached wrapper or null.
